acceptance_criteria.text: Finance impact compares KPI values and completed actions.
gaps: Impact is directional comparison, not causal attribution.

acceptance_criteria.text: Finance history returns monthly points for 3, 6 or 12 months.
gaps: Live DB smoke was not run locally.

acceptance_criteria.text: Finance UI shows action impact and period history.
